title: GENARCH v1.0.0 — Initial Release
summary: First public release of the GENARCH atlas with diseases, exposures, genes, pathways, and mechanism briefs.
content:
## GENARCH v1.0.0

This release marks the first public availability of the GENARCH atlas.

### Highlights
- Curated disease profiles with genetic architecture and exposure modifiers
- Exposure definitions and system-level effects
- Gene and pathway annotations
- Mechanism briefs explaining GxE hypotheses
- Knowledge graph of entity relationships
- Community module foundations

### Data Sources
- GWAS Catalog, GTEx, literature curation
- See /methods for full pipeline documentation

title: GENARCH v0.9 Beta
content:
## Beta Release

Preliminary release for testing and stakeholder feedback.
